query:
INSERT INTO product_categories (name, slug, description, icon) VALUES 
('Snacks & Crisps', 'snacks-crisps', 'Chips, crisps, nuts, and snack foods', '🥨'),
('Beverages', 'beverages', 'Soft drinks, juices, water, and beverages', '🥤'),
('Frozen Foods', 'frozen-foods', 'Ice cream, frozen meals, and frozen products', '🧊'),
('Dairy & Eggs', 'dairy-eggs', 'Milk, cheese, yogurt, butter, and eggs', '🥛'),
('Bakery', 'bakery', 'Bread, pastries, cakes, and baked goods', '🍞'),
('Fresh Produce', 'fresh-produce', 'Fruits, vegetables, and fresh produce', '🥬'),
('Meat & Seafood', 'meat-seafood', 'Fresh and packaged meat, poultry, and seafood', '🥩'),
('Deli & Prepared', 'deli-prepared', 'Deli meats, salads, and prepared foods', '🥪'),
('Pantry Staples', 'pantry-staples', 'Rice, pasta, canned goods, and cooking essentials', '🥫'),
('Breakfast & Cereal', 'breakfast-cereal', 'Cereals, oatmeal, and breakfast items', '🥣'),
('Condiments & Sauces', 'condiments-sauces', 'Ketchup, mayo, sauces, and condiments', '🍯'),
('Candy & Sweets', 'candy-sweets', 'Chocolates, candy, and sweet treats', '🍬'),
('Health & Beauty', 'health-beauty', 'Personal care, cosmetics, and health products', '💄'),
('Household', 'household', 'Cleaning supplies, paper products, and household items', '🧹'),
('Pet Supplies', 'pet-supplies', 'Pet food, treats, and pet care products', '🐾');
